caption: A screen recording shows a web browser displaying a random list generator and a live stream. The left side of the screen features a numbered list of names, with "Michael Loguericio" appearing multiple times. Text on this page includes "IP: 47.144.180.205" and "Timestamps: 2023-05-20 03:14:55 UTC." A banner warns, "Don't use this service for giveaways! Use Multi-Round Giveaways instead." To the right, a chat window shows messages from "glowbug27" and "Nightbot," with the latter posting a link: "Click the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE! >>> https://bit.ly/2ZdE8K9." Below the chat is a video feed of a man with a beard wearing a black shirt. In the center of the screen, a white window from "RANDOM.ORG" appears, listing names such as "Scott Effort" and "Michael Loguericio*." A red and white logo for "JAYS CASEBREAKS.COM" is visible at the bottom.
